## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, ...)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md (or added `skip-changelog` label)
- [ ] Updated documentation if relevant
- [ ] All CI checks green
- [ ] Confirmed no secrets, credentials or PII in the diff
